Test Case Description: Verify My Account entry point is displayed
Verify guest user can open sign-in page
Verify login with valid credentials
Steps: 1. Open sign-in page 2. Enter valid email/password 3. Submit
Expected Result: User logs in successfully and is redirected as designed

Test Case Description: Verify login with invalid password
Steps: 1. Enter valid email and invalid password 2. Submit
Expected Result: Error message is displayed and user is not logged in

Test Case Description: Verify login with unregistered email
Steps: 1. Enter unregistered email and password 2. Submit

Test Case Description: Verify required field validation on login form
Verify email format validation on login form
Verify password masking/unmasking if available
Verify user remains logged in after page refresh
Verify logged-in state is reflected in header
Expected Result: Header shows logged-in account state correctly

Test Case Description: Verify user can log out successfully
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected as designed

Test Case Description: Verify protected account page is not accessible after logout
Steps: 1. Try to open My Account URL directly
Expected Result: User is redirected to login page or access is blocked

Verify account can be created with valid details
Verify duplicate email registration is blocked
Verify required field validation on registration form
Verify invalid email format validation on registration form
Verify password rule validation

Test Case Description: Verify confirm password validation
Steps: 1. Enter different password and confirm password 2. Submit

Test Case Description: Verify marketing/newsletter opt-in behavior during registration
Expected Result: Marketing preference is saved according to selection

Test Case Description: Verify forgot password page opens correctly

Test Case Description: Verify forgot password with invalid email format
Verify forgot password required field validation
